title: macrolobium limbatum
intro: Macrolobium limbatum, also known as the 'Red Ironwood' or 'Ironwood', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Macrolobium limbatum include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
